zh.lifeSummary: 當Alice Ashton於1195年出生在英國藍卡爾阿希頓-德-林時，她的父親Roger Wrightington de Asheton30歲，母親Alice25歲。她和Sir Henry de Chetham至少有1個兒子和1個女兒。她去世於1278年在英國藍卡爾享年83歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Alice Ashton于1195年出生在英国藍卡爾阿希頓-德-林时，她的父亲Roger Wrightington de Asheton30岁，母亲Alice25岁。她和Sir Henry de Chetham至少有1个儿子和1个女儿。她去世于1278年在英国藍卡爾享年83岁。

nameMeanings.name: Ashton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of numerous places so called, especially Ashton-under-Lyne near Manchester. Most are named from Old English æsc ‘ash tree’ + tūn ‘settlement’; the one in Northamptonshire is (æt thǣm) æscum ‘(at the) ash trees’. Others have been assimilated to this from different sources. The one in Devon is ‘the settlement (tūn) of Æschere’, while the one in Hertfordshire is ‘the settlement of Ælli’.

variants.name: Aspden
meanings: English: habitational name from Aspden (alias Aspen) in Oswaldtwistle, Lancashire. This surname has been confused with   Ashton   and   Austin  , and probably also with   Aston   and   Astin  , all of which are common surnames in Lancashire.

nameMeanings.name: Alice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a variant of Adelaide , representing an Old French spelling of a reduced form of Germanic Adalheidis. Alice and Adelaide were already regarded as distinct names in English during the medieval period. Alice enjoyed a surge of popularity in the 19th century and periods of favour ever since. It was the name of the central character of Lewis Carroll's Alice's Adventures in Wonderland ( 1865 ) and Through the Looking Glass ( 1872 ), who was based on his child friend Alice Liddell , daughter of the Dean of Christ Church, Oxford.

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

en.lifeSummary: When Alice Ashton was born in 1195, in Ashton-under-Lyne, Lancashire, England, her father, Roger Wrightington de Asheton, was 30 and her mother, Alice, was 25. She had at least 1 son and 1 daughter with Sir Henry de Chetham. She died in 1278, in Lancashire, England, at the age of 83.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Alice Ashton est née en 1195, à Ashton-under-Lyne, Lancashire, Angleterre, son père, Roger Wrightington de Asheton, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Alice, avait 25 ans. Elle a eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille avec Sir Henry de Chetham. Elle est décédée en 1278, à Lancashire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 83 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Alice Ashton 1195 in Ashton-under-Lyne, Lancashire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Roger Wrightington de Asheton 30 und ihre Mutter Alice 25. Sie hatte mit Sir Henry de Chetham mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1278 im Alter von 83 Jahren in Lancashire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Alice Ashton è nata il nel 1195 nel Ashton-under-Lyne, Lancashire, England, sua padre, Roger Wrightington de Asheton, aveva 30 anni e sua madre, Alice, aveva 25 anni. Lei avuto almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia con Sir Henry de Chetham. Morì nel 1278, nel Lancashire, England, all'età di 83 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Alice Ashtonが1195年にイギリスランカシュアイアアシュトン-ウンデル-リンで生まれた時，父Roger Wrightington de Ashetonは30歳，母Aliceは25歳であった。彼女はSir Henry de Chethamとの間に少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1278年にイギリスランカシュアイアで83歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Alice Ashton(이)가 1195년 영국 랭카실르 애슈토-운더-리니에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Roger Wrightington de Asheton(은)는 30세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Alice(은)는 25세였다. 그녀는 Sir Henry de Chetham(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1278년 영국 랭카실르에서 83세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Alice Ashton nasceu em 1195, em Ashton-under-Lyne, Lancashire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Roger Wrightington de Asheton, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Alice, tinha 25 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha com Sir Henry de Chetham. Ela faleceu em 1278, em Lancashire, Inglaterra, com 83 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alice Ashton родилась в 1195 г. в местности аштон-ундир-лин, ланкашир, Англия, её отцу по имени Roger Wrightington de Asheton было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Alice, 25. У неё был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь от Sir Henry de Chetham. Она умерла в 1278 г. в местности ланкашир, Англия в возрасте 83 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Alice Ashton nació en 1195, en Ashton-under-Lyne, Lancashire, Inglaterra, su papá, Roger Wrightington de Asheton, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Alice, tenía 25 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija con Sir Henry de Chetham. Murió en 1278, en Lancashire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 83 años.
